landing.hero_subtitle: A structured 12-session curriculum covering Excel, SQL, Python, Power BI, and data storytelling — built for the Indonesian job market.
landing.how_step1_desc: Study structured lessons with real-world examples and interactive content.
landing.how_step2_desc: Write real SQL queries, analyze datasets, and get instant feedback.
landing.how_step3_desc: Track your completion, earn scores, and build your portfolio.
landing.phases_subtitle: Four phases designed to take you from beginner to job-ready analyst.
landing.curriculum_subtitle: 12 sessions covering everything a modern data analyst needs.
landing.footer_copyright: © 2026 Data Analytics Learning Platform. All rights reserved.

feedback.submitted_title: Thanks for your live session feedback!
feedback.submitted_desc: Your response has been recorded and will help us improve future live sessions.
feedback.section_materials_desc: Rate the content covered during the live session
feedback.section_mentor_desc: Rate how the mentor conducted the live session
feedback.section_overall_desc: Your overall impression of this live session
feedback.label_materials: How would you rate the quality of the live session content?
feedback.label_exercises: How useful were the in-session activities and discussions?
feedback.label_mentor_clarity: How clearly did the mentor explain the concepts during the live session?
feedback.label_mentor_management: How well did the mentor manage the class flow and timing?
feedback.label_mentor_engagement: How responsive was the mentor to questions during the session?
feedback.label_overall: Overall, how satisfied are you with this live session?
feedback.label_highlight: What was the most valuable part of this live session?
feedback.placeholder_highlight: What stood out during the live session? What will you apply?
feedback.label_improve: What could be improved in future live sessions?
feedback.placeholder_improve: Pace, depth of discussion, class interaction, delivery…
feedback.label_other: Any other comments for the mentor or organiser?
feedback.placeholder_other: Anything else you'd like to share…
feedback.validation_rate_all: Please rate all categories before submitting.
feedback.validation_highlight_required: Please share what was most valuable about the session.

cohort.none_title: You're not enrolled in a cohort yet
cohort.none_body: Lessons open once you're enrolled in a cohort. Enrollment is available during an admission period — check back when the next intake opens.
